GS-31, Grade 4 Interceptor. Equipped with Apex Shred, this ship excels against Apex Raider hostiles. It is also equipped with a powerful tractor beam Gravitational Blast that does direct hull damage and chains to multiple non-Armada hostiles.

U.S.S. DAUNTLESS, Grade 4 Interceptor. The U.S.S. Dauntless, a one-of-a-kind prototype ship, has the unique Seek and Destroy ability, automatically targeting and destroying non-Armada hostiles.

Uniquely suited to <color=#FFEF40>detect and combat V'ger Fighters</color>, and enhance the capabilities of deployed ships around the galaxy.

Constructing the ship grants access to a special strongbox in the <color=#FFEF40>Challenge Refinery</color>, and a new <color=#FFEF40>Daily Challenge</color> starting from the next daily reset.

<color=#FFEF40>Tier up the Excelsior</color> to improve the rewards from the Challenge Refinery and gain greater power from ship research.

Blueprints can be obtained from the Store or Challenge Refinery.
